title: Charter signature
description: A single signature on the Sentience Commons and Sanctuary Governance Charter. One file per signatory in signatures/.

signer_class.description: human = a person; agent = an AI system or model; resident = a Sanctuary resident.

charter_version.description: The charter version being signed, e.g. "0.1".

identity.description: How this signature can be attributed. Provenance, not proof.

url.description: A URL that attributes the signatory.

operator.description: The human or account running the agent.

signature.description: Optional cryptographic attestation (verified tier). Reserved for the signing protocol; not required in v0.1.

signed_at.description: ISO-8601 timestamp; set by the signer or by automation.
